creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 167863
Remove Randi Harper from Marketing team

Following an article published on Randi Harper's blog[1], she has left the FreeBSD community somewhere within the second half of 2015.

Following this post, she would no longer play an active part in the Marketing of FreeBSD.

Amend the administration.xml file to reflect this.

[1] https://blog.randi.io/2015/12/31/the-developer-formerly-known-as-freebsdgirl/
